summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are executed. No security-sensitive hydrated items were detected. One close-superseded recommendation is safe to plan against hydrated open state; the rest are conservative keep/needs-human classifications.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR related to a closed prior attempt and should stay open for maintainer/author follow-up, not be closed in this inventory shard.
Same root cause and same user-visible MCP warning/config failure as #92484, but narrower; #92484 is hydrated and open as the better canonical path.
Best hydrated MCP #92474 fix candidate in this shard, but this inventory job has no merge/fix authority and no shared cluster canonical should be invented.
Focused watch migration PR with useful code and distinct scope; keep open as related follow-up rather than closing or merging in this shard.
Valid linked fix candidate for #92285, but issue closeout/merge are blocked until maintainer proof and merge gates are satisfied.
Broad but substantive cleanup-safety PR should remain open for review/author iteration; this plan should not close or merge it.
Substantive Telegram linked fix candidate; keep open for proof/maintainer review rather than close in inventory classification.
Broad feature PR with unresolved review-bot findings and a failing check needs maintainer/product judgment before any close/merge path.
Related small fix candidate with failing proof checks and an unhydrated broader superseding reference; keep open rather than close on incomplete canonical evidence.
Distinct Feishu PR with unresolved bot finding and failing proof; keep independent and open for author/maintainer follow-up.

needs_human: #93387 requires maintainer/product judgment because the broad watch action-surface PR has unresolved review-bot findings and a failing check.
